requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 230 V / 50 Hz, Type I Plug (AS/NZS 3112)

summary.en: Samoa operates at 230 V / 50 Hz and uses the Type I (Australian AS/NZS 3112) three-pin plug. Wireless devices and IoT equipment with mains power supplies must be designed, tested, and supplied with plugs and power supply units compliant with AS/NZS 3112 and relevant AS/NZS low-voltage electrical safety standards. Chinese CCC electrical safety certification (covering 220 V and Chinese plug types) is not recognised in Samoa. Products with Chinese-standard plugs (Type A, B) require replacement of power supply units and plug heads or must be supplied with a certified AS/NZS 3112-compliant adapter.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚电网电压为230V/50Hz，使用I型（澳大利亚AS/NZS 3112）三芯插头。带有市电电源的无线设备及物联网设备，其插头和电源须符合AS/NZS 3112及相关AS/NZS低压电气安全标准的设计、测试和供应要求。中国CCC电气安全认证（覆盖220V及中国插头类型）不被萨摩亚认可。配备中国标准插头（A型、B型）的产品，须更换电源插头或随附经认证的AS/NZS 3112合规转换插头。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞電網電壓為230V/50Hz，使用I型（澳大利亞AS/NZS 3112）三芯插頭。帶有市電電源的無線設備及物聯網設備，其插頭和電源須符合AS/NZS 3112及相關AS/NZS低壓電氣安全標準的設計、測試和供應要求。中國CCC電氣安全認證（覆蓋220V及中國插頭類型）不被薩摩亞認可。配備中國標準插頭（A型、B型）的產品，須更換電源插頭或隨附經認證的AS/NZS 3112合規轉換插頭。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 3112 — Approval and test specification for plugs, socket-outlets, adapters, and cord extension sets (Type I, 230 V, 3-pin)
AS/NZS 3820 — Essentials of electrical safety (general low-voltage equipment safety standard adopted by Samoa)
Electricity Act 2010 (Samoa) — governing electrical equipment safety obligations for equipment placed on the Samoan market

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for mains-powered devices is certified under the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme against GB 4943.1 (ITE safety), GB 8898 (audio/video equipment safety), or other product-specific GB safety standards. Chinese plugs are Type A (two-pin flat) or Type I (three-pin flat, same shape as AS/NZS 3112 but rated at 220 V). CCC certification and Chinese GB electrical safety approvals are not recognised by Samoa.
summary.zh: 在中国，市电供电设备的电气安全须通过CCC（中国强制认证）依据GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全）、GB 8898（音频/视频设备安全）或其他适用GB安全标准进行认证。中国插头为A型（两芯扁平）或I型（三芯扁平，外形与AS/NZS 3112相同，但额定电压为220V）。CCC认证及中国GB电气安全认证不被萨摩亚认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，市電供電設備的電氣安全須通過CCC（中國強制認證）依據GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全）、GB 8898（音頻/視頻設備安全）或其他適用GB安全標準進行認證。中國插頭為A型（兩芯扁平）或I型（三芯扁平，外形與AS/NZS 3112相同，但額定電壓為220V）。CCC認證及中國GB電氣安全認證不被薩摩亞認可。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification for mains-powered electrical equipment
GB 4943.1 — Chinese safety standard for information technology equipment
GB 8898 — Chinese safety standard for audio, video, and similar electronic apparatus
GB 2099.1 — Chinese standard for plugs and socket-outlets (220 V)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised in Samoa. Mains-powered wireless devices exported to Samoa must be re-certified or supplied with AS/NZS 3112-compliant plugs and power supply units tested to relevant AS/NZS electrical safety standards. Although the physical plug shape of Chinese Type I (GB 2099) may appear similar to AS/NZS 3112, the voltage rating and compliance framework differ; separate AS/NZS 3112 compliance testing is required. Devices designed for dual-voltage operation (100–240 V) reduce the voltage gap but do not eliminate the need for AS/NZS 3112 plug compliance.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证不被萨摩亚认可。出口至萨摩亚的市电供电无线设备，须重新认证或随附依据相关AS/NZS电气安全标准测试的AS/NZS 3112合规插头和电源。尽管中国I型插头（GB 2099）的外形与AS/NZS 3112相似，但额定电压及合规框架不同；须进行单独的AS/NZS 3112合规测试。支持宽电压（100–240V）的设备可缩小电压差距，但不能免除AS/NZS 3112插头合规要求。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證不被薩摩亞認可。出口至薩摩亞的市電供電無線設備，須重新認證或隨附依據相關AS/NZS電氣安全標準測試的AS/NZS 3112合規插頭和電源。儘管中國I型插頭（GB 2099）的外形與AS/NZS 3112相似，但額定電壓及合規框架不同；須進行單獨的AS/NZS 3112合規測試。支持寬電壓（100–240V）的設備可縮小電壓差距，但不能免除AS/NZS 3112插頭合規要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety conformance to AS/NZS 3112 and relevant AS/NZS electrical safety standards required for mains-powered equipment supplied in Samoa
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification against applicable GB electrical safety standards required for mains-powered equipment supplied in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised in Samoa. Mains-powered wireless devices must be supplied with AS/NZS 3112-compliant (230 V / 50 Hz, Type I) plugs and power supply units tested to applicable AS/NZS low-voltage electrical safety standards. Dual-voltage (100–240 V) designs assist voltage compatibility but do not replace AS/NZS 3112 plug compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC电气安全认证不被萨摩亚认可。市电供电无线设备须随附依据适用AS/NZS低压电气安全标准测试的AS/NZS 3112合规（230V/50Hz，I型）插头和电源。宽电压（100–240V）设计有助于电压兼容，但不能取代AS/NZS 3112插头合规要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC電氣安全認證不被薩摩亞認可。市電供電無線設備須隨附依據適用AS/NZS低壓電氣安全標準測試的AS/NZS 3112合規（230V/50Hz，I型）插頭和電源。寬電壓（100–240V）設計有助於電壓兼容，但不能取代AS/NZS 3112插頭合規要求。
